title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 442.280 - What subscribing witness shall prove before certificate shall be granted
text:
442.280.  What subscribing witness shall prove before certificate shall be granted. — No certificate of such proof shall be granted, unless such subscribing witness shall prove that the person whose name is subscribed thereto as a party is the person who executed the same; that such person executed the instrument, and that such witness subscribed his name as a witness thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 3419) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3032; 1919 § 2191; 1909 § 2802
